description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a slightly bulbous end for improved grip. The head is metallic, with one side forming a flat, circular striking face and the other side split into a curved claw for nail removal. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the head, with a visible transition between the wood and metal. The wood shows a slightly rough, matte finish, while the metal head is more uniform and hard, with a dull sheen. The hammer is of a size suitable for one-handed use, typical for general carpentry or household tasks. No visible branding, markings, or accessories are present, and the tool appears to be in good condition without obvious wear or damage.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a wooden handle and a metal head, featuring a striking face and a curved claw for pulling nails. The handle is textured and the head is robust, with no visible branding or damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded end of the wooden handle and the symmetrical split of the claw head.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the wooden handle and the distinct shape of the hammer head, including the striking face and claw.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the width of the head, the curvature of the claw, and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, showing the handle's grain and the hammer head's features from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden straight handle with a bulbous end, visible wood grain texture, and a slightly rough, matte finish.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal, made of steel.
